new_claims.claim_text: Netanyahu and his wife have been officially declared dead.
new_claims.notes: Debunked by web search, multiple credible sources confirm Netanyahu is alive. Clear disinformation.

new_claims.claim_text: A Dubai plane carrying Israeli soldiers crashed into a residential area near Tel Aviv's airport, killing all the Israeli soldiers, hit by an Iranian hypersonic missile.
new_claims.notes: No credible reports of such an event found via web search. Severe disinformation.
